raw.subject: Your Dayton page caught my eye, Valley Waggs Ltd.
raw.body:
Hi,

I was scrolling through Dayton pet care services and noticed your Black Angus heritage is still going strong - love the photos you share of those adorable furry friends!

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean some potential clients are missing out on booking your pet & house sitting services.

I sketched out a simple page idea from what you post on Facebook - it includes sections for your services overview, a photo gallery of those adorable faces, a contact section, and even a map & hours section so clients know where to find you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/valley-waggs-ltd-dayton

Would love to chat about bringing your online presence to life with a straightforward project at a flat fee for local businesses - reply or give me a quick call to discuss details.
